Transforming Data into Insightful Stories

Aspiring Data Analyst passionate about transforming data into engaging experiences and actionable insights.

View My Work Download Resume Contact Me

About Me

I am Sundharmoorthi, an aspiring Data Analyst with skills in Power BI, Excel, Tableau 3 and Python. I enjoy turning data into clear insights through visualization, reporting, and automation. I can design interactive dashboards, clean and transform data, and create reports that help in decision-making. I also have knowledge of KNIME, Power Automate, and Azure, which supports workflow automation and data integration. I am a continuous learner who loves working in team-oriented environments to deliver meaningful results.

Education

B.E. Computer Science and Engineering

KGiSL Institute of Technology (Graduation: 2026)

Skills

Services

Data Analytics

Transforming raw data into actionable insights through in-depth analysis, statistical modeling, and predictive analytics to drive informed decision-making.

Web Development

Building responsive and user-friendly web applications using modern front-end and back-end technologies to create engaging digital experiences.

Projects / Portfolio

Car Theft Analysis

Tools: Excel

An Excel dashboard using pivot tables, charts, and slicers to analyze car theft trends. It identifies patterns, hotspots, and time-based variations in incidents. The project delivers actionable insights for prevention and decision-making.

View Download

Blinkit Sales Dashboard

Tools: Power BI & SQL

An interactive dashboard developed in Power BI using SQL-preprocessed data to analyze Blinkit’s sales and operations. It visualizes sales performance, customer behavior, seasonal demand, and product trends with interactive filters. This dashboard empowers stakeholders to make data-driven decisions and improve operational efficiency.

View Download

Electric Vehicle Dashboard

Tools: Tableau

A Tableau-based dashboard that analyzes the electric vehicle (EV) market by visualizing adoption rates, performance, and market trends. It highlights charging infrastructure, government incentives, and consumer behavior, enabling comparisons with traditional vehicles. With interactive visuals, stakeholders can track growth, market share, and sustainability patterns for informed decision-making.

View Download

"A developer isn't just someone who writes code — they are builders of digital worlds, architects of logic, and problem solvers at heart. Each line of code tells a story of curiosity, persistence, and creativity. Whether it's debugging late at night or deploying at sunrise, developers bring ideas to life one function at a time."
